patient_id: # Boston Gene osteosarcoma BG003082, paired-end RNA-seq (Nov 2022).
# Normal sample (issue #277): Jan 2025 Hudson Lab PBMC scRNA-seq (sorted CD3+ T cells,
# 10x 3' GEX). Single-end alignment of R2 only — R1 is barcode+UMI, not cDNA. The
# Cell Ranger Multi run had --create-bam=false so we align the FASTQ directly via
# the existing HISAT2 single-end path (no code change). Single-lane proof-of-concept;
# expand to remaining lanes/captures (Pool 1 L003, Pool 2, Pool 3) if filtering or
# HLA-typing lift is meaningful. Replaces the WES blood normal previously used for
# HLA typing only — OptiType runs in --rna mode and natively supports RNA-seq.
# FASTQs are publicly downloadable from the Backblaze B2 bucket via HTTPS.
# Dataset migrated from gs://osteosarc-genomics to B2 in Apr 2025.
# A*01:11N is a null allele (not expressed); excluded from prediction, shown in QC.
